projects.title: Ad Analysis Skill
projects.description: Runs parameterized Python analysis for ad KPIs. Invoke when users ask about ad performance, CTR/CVR/ECPM breakdowns, comparisons, or anomaly reasons.

projects.title: Intelligent Travel Planner
projects.description: Discover effortless travel planning with our AI-powered product. Whether you're exploring a new city or curating a dream vacation, our intelligent system tailors personalized itineraries just for you. Save time, reduce stress, and unlock the best experiences tailored to your interests.

blogPosts.title: Understanding Transformer Architecture in Modern NLP
blogPosts.description: 模型是起点，而非终点。Data Agent要充分发挥出数据智能，Data Infra层有较多难题要解。AI的加速度超快，一切都被按下了快进键。
blogPosts.content:
2025年，Data Agent是AI在数据领域热点话题，完成了从概念到价值落地的演进，其价值已经在几个核心应用场景中崭露头角：
  • 智能问数、提数助手：用自然语言替代重复的临时数据查询需求，解放人力；
  • 异常监控与归因：发现数据波动，自动分析维度，给出可能的原因等；
  • 智能营销：整合用户侧工单、订单等信息，构建出更细力度的画像标签，提高营销域效率。
长期来看，Data Agent不会局限在数据工具层，而是会逐步演进成为企业的「智能接口层」，与企业数据基础、权限体系和业务流程深度集成的复杂系统。而这个演进的过程，核心在于落地面向AI应用的Agent Infra。从酷炫的「Toy Agent」到真正能创造价值的「Productive Agent」，需要与AI“贴身肉搏”——工程实现（Infra）的扎实度与产品设计的巧思是真正的壁垒所在，避免出现「一看Demo吊炸天，一到生产全崩盘」的情况。Data Infra目前的一些技术难点主要在于数据资产的融合、数据理解能力和交付系统级的确定性。
解锁非结构化数据价值，打造“硬通货”
解锁非结构化数据的价值。AI能力（多模态技术等）能够解锁更多非结构化数据的价值，企业内大量有价值的信息隐藏在文档、图片、音频、视频中。之前都依赖于分析师完成结构化数据和业务信息的关联、理解、解读，当然非常复杂的判断依然离不开人。Data Infra深度融合多模态技术，具备多模数据的处理能力，使Agent能够像理解表格数据一样，理解一份合同的关键条款、一张产品图片的缺陷，或一段客服录音的情绪倾向，将这些非结构化信息纳入统一的语义分析框架，将能在很大程度上提高
「好数据」是硬通货。数据治理是AI时代刚需，不属于数据团队的专属课题，所有AI模型、AI应用都在避免「Garbage in，Garbage out」。高质量的数据飞轮构建起来，AI产品的效果才是真的能打。尤其是落地到实际业务场景要解决问题的产品，获取高质量的领域知识很关键，即context很重要。Agent的“智商”取决于数据底座的“健康度”。数据治理是个“苦差事”，或许可以有数据治理agent，定义清楚什么是「好数据」，治理agent可以辅助人做很多治理工作，不过前期肯定要花很多精力人肉打磨。
语义层构建AI「认知底座」
Data Infra的另一个瓶颈是数据理解的能力，核心是构建语义层，语义层的质量决定了后续各类数据应用的智能水平，如同AI的“认知底座”。Infra的核心应是一个强大的语义建模与知识抽取平台。它能够自动或半自动地从数据源中发现实体、关系和业务规则，持续沉淀和演化企业的领域知识图谱，并为上层Agent提供稳定、高效的知识查询与推理服务。
语义层主要在于“理解”而非“翻译”。 如果将自然语言直接“翻译”成SQL查询语句，效果一般不及预期。例如“上周营收为什么下滑？”，实际上融合了时间口径（自然周vs财务周）、业务指标（GMV、客单价、动销率）和行业常识（促销周期、竞品动态）的综合性查询语义。这要求语义层必须具备强大的元数据理解与关联能力，能够构建出动态的、富含业务逻辑的知识图谱（Knowledge Graph）。知识图谱扮演着“认知导航图”的角色。 它将散落在各处的数据实体（如“商品”、“门店”、“用户”）、属性及其间复杂的关系（如“属于”、“购买于”、“影响”）结构化地组织起来。一个高质量的语义层，本质上是一个可被Agent理解和推理的业务知识图谱。它让Agent不仅知道“销售额”这个字段在哪里，更理解“销售额”在零售场景下与“促销活动”、“库存水平”、“季节性”的因果链条。这正是Data Agent能从“查数工具”进化为“分析专家”的关键飞跃。
 
从概率系统到确定系统
生产级Agent不能是“黑盒”，多轮对话、Planner等每个环节也不能是随机投骰子，稳定性、可扩展性、安全与治理能力缺一不可。性能的波动、并发请求的激增、数据权限的复杂校验，任何一环的缺失都可能导致整个系统“崩盘”。这要求Infra设计必须从一开始就面向严苛的生产标准，将“确定性”作为第一性原理。
 
除了Infra层有比较好的确定性约束工程实现，产品设计做好和用户交互，同时做好各个环节的评估。推荐吴恩达「Building and Evaluate Data Agents」课程，课程中提出的Agent评估方法非常完备，可以拓展延伸到很多实际的场景，细化成一整套评估Agent的指标体系，给Agent上一道“安全栓”。
 
AI的加速度持续猛烈，Data Infra在AI技术的推动下会不断演化，数据产品和业务系统的边界也将越来越模糊。Data Agent会逐步成为企业AI应用的「智能接口层」，人与数据的交互会更自然、无感。

comments.author: Alex Chen
comments.content: Great article! The explanation of multi-head attention was particularly clear. I've been implementing transformers in my research and this helped clarify some concepts.

zh.title: Understanding Transformer Architecture in Modern NLP
zh.description: A deep dive into the attention mechanism and how transformers revolutionized natural language processing tasks across various domains.
zh.content:
The transformer architecture has fundamentally changed the landscape of natural language processing. Introduced in the seminal paper "Attention Is All You Need" by Vaswani et al., transformers have become the foundation for modern language models.

### The Attention Mechanism
At the heart of the transformer is the self-attention mechanism, which allows the model to weigh the importance of different words in a sentence when processing each word. Unlike recurrent neural networks (RNNs), transformers can process all words in parallel, significantly speeding up training.

### Key Components
The transformer consists of several key components:
- **Multi-Head Attention**: Allows the model to focus on different aspects of the input simultaneously
- **Position Encoding**: Provides information about word order since the model processes input in parallel
- **Feed-Forward Networks**: Process the attention outputs through dense layers
- **Layer Normalization**: Stabilizes training and improves convergence

### Impact on Modern NLP
Transformers have enabled the development of powerful models like BERT, GPT, and T5. These models have achieved state-of-the-art results across a wide range of NLP tasks, from question answering to text generation.
The scalability of transformers has also led to the era of large language models, with models containing billions of parameters demonstrating emergent capabilities in reasoning, coding, and creative tasks.

### Conclusion
Understanding transformer architecture is essential for anyone working in modern NLP. As the field continues to evolve, transformers remain the dominant paradigm, with ongoing research exploring ways to make them more efficient and capable.

blogPosts.title: Efficient Training Strategies for Large Language Models
blogPosts.description: Exploring techniques like gradient accumulation, mixed precision training, and distributed computing for training state-of-the-art models.
blogPosts.content: Training large language models (LLMs) requires immense computational resources. To make this process more efficient, researchers use several key strategies. Gradient accumulation allows for effectively larger batch sizes without increasing memory usage per step. Mixed precision training (using FP16 instead of FP32) speeds up computations and reduces memory footprint, while distributed data parallel (DDP) techniques allow training across hundreds or thousands of GPUs.

en.title: Efficient Training Strategies for Large Language Models
en.description: Exploring techniques like gradient accumulation, mixed precision training, and distributed computing for training state-of-the-art models.

blogPosts.title: Computer Vision Trends in 2026
blogPosts.description: Latest developments in object detection, image segmentation, and the convergence of vision and language models for multimodal understanding.
blogPosts.content: In 2026, computer vision has moved beyond simple classification. Multimodal models that bridge vision and language are now the standard, enabling more natural interaction with visual data. Techniques like Vision Transformers (ViT) have largely superseded traditional CNNs for large-scale tasks, and real-time 3D reconstruction from single images has become a practical reality for mobile devices.
